# 对话过程中生成的各种链接,不支持直接打开链接 · Issue #22 · AIDotNet/OpenCowork · GitHub

**Source**: https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenCowork/issues/22
**Description**: 目前是这样的: 希望能支持这样的,每一个文件链接都能在界面上点击直接打开

---

目前是这样的:

[![Image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/7991696/566661252-f5bf41f8-c7b9-4107-be07-d56bc6c36c8f.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DSi1vISlEqdztOX8qgxdnDG8I1n7k6ic9f3z-UVET8Y)](https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenCowork/issues/<https:/private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/7991696/566661252-f5bf41f8-c7b9-4107-be07-d56bc6c36c8f.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DSi1vISlEqdztOX8qgxdnDG8I1n7k6ic9f3z-UVET8Y>)

希望能支持这样的,每一个文件链接都能在界面上点击直接打开  
[![Image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/7991696/566661092-da3872bd-347f-4da0-bd9d-47fb788f6e06.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..G82B9nyjPNxlHm33kNsudmY5ESLCM54ITnymSBVyAFQ)](https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenCowork/issues/<https:/private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/7991696/566661092-da3872bd-347f-4da0-bd9d-47fb788f6e06.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..G82B9nyjPNxlHm33kNsudmY5ESLCM54ITnymSBVyAFQ>)
